Duplicate total revenue row with identical values; useful as fallback label across periods.

candidates.why: Core SG&A overhead component; appears populated.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|missing. R:c. Candidate list appears incomplete for SG&A because a clear overhead row 'Sales and distribution costs' exists in the preview but was not included among candidates. Chose it from the full preview per instructions. Also selected 'Administrative costs', but that label appears twice in the sheet, creating ambiguity about which instance is intended; exact-label constraints prevent disambiguation. Excluded subtotal-like 'Sales costs' because it equals the distribution row plus balancing values. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales and distribution costs
No dedicated research/development expense line is visible on the provided Income Statement.

candidates.why: Best recurring interest-cost total; equals underlying interest expense components and excludes broader non-interest finance items better than Financial expenses.
Core interest expense component, but appears to exclude lease-interest component.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring interest component on leases, but already appears included in Interest expenses on financial items.
Too broad; includes FX and other financial items.
Could include recurring finance costs, but less clearly pure interest.

variables.notes: Preferred the granular recurring interest total over broader 'Financial expenses' and avoided double counting its underlying components.

candidates.why: Best equity line excluding non-controlling interests, since adding NCI gives the broader Equity line.
Appears to include non-controlling interests; not preferred when a parent-equity-equivalent line exists.

variables.notes: Selected 'Total equity' because it appears to exclude non-controlling interests: Total equity + Equity attributable to non-controlling interests = Equity.

candidates.why: Direct non-controlling interest equity line on the balance sheet.
Label exists but appears empty in preview; less preferable than the explicit populated NCI row.
Income statement allocation line, not balance-sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet non-controlling interest equity line, consistent with BE excluding NCI.
